## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature request.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why is it useful for interpretability or reproducibility?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative approaches you considered.

## Reproducibility / Evaluation Impact
How should this feature be validated or benchmarked?

## Additional Context
Add any links, references, or screenshots here.
